summary: Iteration 37 - PDF Export, Onboarding Progress Tracker, Coaching Loop. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Owner sees Onboarding Tracker widget with crew progress bars and milestone badges, AM Report widget with Export PDF button (download works), Crew Leaders, Supervisor Checklist, Weekly Digest widgets (regression OK). Coaching Loop widget not visible because no repeat offenders exist (expected behavior - widget only shows when total_offenders > 0).
critical_code_review_comments: Coaching Loop widget only renders when coachingLoop.report?.length > 0 || coachingLoop.summary?.total_offenders > 0 - this is correct behavior but may confuse users if no repeat offenders exist
seed_data_creation: Created coaching actions via API for testing (coach_8b0f5f633d6f and others)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified all new features: 1) PDF Export at /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF with proper headers, 2) Onboarding Progress at /api/onboarding/progress returns crews with 6 milestones (first_submission, first_review, training_started, training_completed, equipment_check, five_submissions), 3) Coaching Loop at /api/coaching/loop-report returns report and summary (0 offenders currently - crews need 2+ flagged issues to appear), 4) Coaching assign/complete endpoints work correctly. Server refactor verified - server.py now ~120 lines with routes imported from /routes/. Seed data moved to shared/seed_data.py. All regression tests pass.

verified_features.backend_auth_after_refactor: POST /api/auth/login returns token for owner credentials
verified_features.backend_pdf_export: GET /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns 200 with content-type application/pdf and valid PDF bytes
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_content_disposition: PDF has Content-Disposition header with attachment and filename
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_auth_required: PDF export requires authentication (401/403 without token)
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_pm_access: PM (management role) can access PDF export
verified_features.backend_onboarding_structure: Each crew has crew_label, leader_name, division, milestones, completed_count, total_milestones, progress_pct
verified_features.backend_coaching_loop_report: GET /api/coaching/loop-report?division=all returns report array and summary object
verified_features.backend_coaching_assign: POST /api/coaching/assign creates coaching action with crew_code, issue_tags, notes
verified_features.frontend_onboarding_tracker_widget: Owner sees widget-onboarding-tracker with crew progress bars (67%, 83%, 83%, 83%) and milestone badges
verified_features.frontend_am_report_widget: Owner sees widget-am-report with Client Quality Report table
verified_features.frontend_export_pdf_button: Export PDF button (data-testid='am-export-pdf-btn') visible and triggers download

notes.coaching_loop_widget: The widget-coaching-loop is not visible because coachingLoop.summary.total_offenders is 0. This is expected behavior - the widget only renders when there are repeat offenders (crews with 2+ flagged issues in 180 days). The backend endpoint works correctly and returns the proper structure.
notes.server_refactor: Server.py successfully refactored to ~120 lines. All routes imported from /routes/ directory. Seed data extracted to shared/seed_data.py. No breaking changes detected.
